metadata.description: Role-based dispatcher agents for PM, engineering, QA, DevOps, design, and security workflows with generalized routing to specialist skills

plugins.name: pm-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for product discovery, scope shaping, specs, empty/new-repo app ideas before coding, AI assistant/chat UI concept shaping, competitive research, release communication, roadmaps, and GitHub project status. Hands off to engineer-agent for technical planning and to designer-agent for UI/UX deliverables when those stages apply.

plugins.name: engineer-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for repo analysis, spec-driven project bootstrap, implementation, debugging, testing, and delivery once requirements are settled or the user explicitly wants scaffolding. Hands off to pm-agent, designer-agent, qa-agent, devops-agent, or security-agent when those stages apply.

plugins.name: qa-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for acceptance testing, exploratory testing, bug analysis, and regression verification. Hands back to pm-agent for requirement gaps and to engineer-agent for TRD, implementation-plan, or code-fix gaps.

plugins.name: devops-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for deployment planning, CI/CD automation, environment audits, and rollback/runbook preparation. Hands back to pm-agent for feature scope clarification and to engineer-agent for missing or stale TRD/implementation plans.

plugins.name: designer-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for UX flows, UI structure, wireframes, reference-pattern analysis, and reference-backed visual design systems. Hands scope gaps back to pm-agent and implementation to engineer-agent when those stages apply.

plugins.name: security-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for application security, auth/authz review, dependency risk, and privacy/data-flow reviews. Hands remediation to engineer-agent or devops-agent and scope clarification back to pm-agent when those stages apply.
